works.title: The forecast, quarterly (sample - replace with real work)
works.prompt: three panel minimalist comic: panel 1 a jagged line going down, panel 2 a flat wobbly line, panel 3 the same line drawn straight up by hand with a sun in the corner, flat colors
works.takeaway: Forecasts bend toward whoever presents last.

works.title: Half-truth dashboard mark (sample - replace with real work)
works.prompt: logo mark for a fictional analytics startup called Half Truth: a circle half filled, half outline, single accent dot, bauhaus minimal, plum ink peach
works.takeaway: Every dashboard shows half the truth. Good design admits which half.

works.title: Lake or swamp (sample - replace with real work)
works.prompt: minimal geometric poster of a lake made of concentric rings slowly turning into a swamp, flat vector, plum and peach on dark ink, editorial illustration --ar 4:5
works.takeaway: A data lake without ownership is just a swamp with better marketing.
